title: thlaspi subulatum
intro: Thlaspi subulatum, also known as 'Lesser Pepperwort', is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi subulatum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Thlaspi subulatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of forms.
